verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A friend of Jesus, oh, what bliss That one so weak as I Should ever have a friend like this To lead me to the sky.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Friendship with Jesus, Fellowship divine; Oh, what blessed sweet communion, Jesus is a friend of mine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A friend when other friendships cease, A friend when others fail; A friend who gives me joy and peace, A friend who will prevail.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A friend to lead me in the dark, A friend who knows the way; A friend to steer my weak, frail bark, A friend my debts to pay.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A friend when sickness lays me low, A friend when death draws near; A friend as through the vale I go, A friend to help and cheer.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: A friend when life's rough voyage is o'er. A friend when death is past; A friend to greet on heaven's shore, A friend when home at last.
